EventDescriptions.EventDescription: The user {subject.name} changed the status of a view to "{object.state}" on host {event_src.host}
The user {subject.name} changed the status of the view "{object.name}" to "{object.state}" on host {event_src.host}
An error occurred while the view "{object.name}" was processed on behalf of the user {subject.name} on host {event_src.host}
